results.title: Aston Villa forced to make major kit change for Europa League final
results.description: ASTON VILLA's preparations for the Europa League final were affected after a late major kit change. The West Midlands outfit face Freiburg in the final at the Besiktas Stadium tonight. Villa hoped to end their 30-year wait for a major trophy but had to do it in an odd version of their away kit. Unai...
